title: brain enrich <note> [--apply] — --json success output
description: Model-authored synthesis enrichment of a single note. Non-mutating PREVIEW by default (emits the proposed ChangePlan, no sinks written); --apply lands the validated + grounded plan as ONE direct commit onto refs/heads/main via the v2 mutation order. v2 (#335, ADR-0003): the risk-tier gate + Tier-3 review-pending are retired — a validated enrichment applies directly (git revert + brain sync is the undo). --dry-run + --apply together ⇒ exit 5.

allOf.description: An applied result carries the integrated canonical commit; a preview carries the proposed plan.

mode.description: preview = non-mutating proposal; applied = the validated plan landed as one direct commit.

sections.description: Distinct sections of the single note touched (preview).

integratedCommit.description: Canonical commit after the direct apply (mode=applied only).

plan.description: The proposed ChangePlan summary (preview) — { operation, ok }.

x-atlas-contract.summary: Synthesis enrichment of a note: non-mutating preview by default; --apply lands the validated plan directly (v2: no tier gate, no review-pending).

flags.description: Perform the mutation (direct apply); without it, emit a non-mutating preview.
Caller-supplied idempotency key; a repeat --apply with the same key + request-hash returns the existing run rather than starting a duplicate (registry idempotency: key-accepting).

sideEffects: apply: one direct commit onto refs/heads/main via the mutation order + projection fold
prohibitedEffects: no review-pending park — a validated enrichment applies directly (git is the undo)

errorCodes.when: unknown flag/argument, missing <note>, or --dry-run combined with --apply
the vault repo is missing or unreadable, or the note does not exist
another maintenance op holds the vault lock
